steps.title: Identify input and output
steps.content:
In 
$$
K(v)=\frac{1}{2}(38)(v^2)
$$, the input $v$ is speed in meters per second, and the output $K(v)$ is kinetic energy in joules.

steps.title: Interpret the function value
steps.content: The statement $K(3)=171$ means that when the speed is $3$ meters per second, the kinetic energy is $171$ joules. The answer is C.
